title: epilobium subulatum
intro: Epilobium subulatum, also known as willowherb or wolf's claw, is a perennial plant species native to North America, belonging to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The plant's roots and leaves have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Epilobium subulatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with urinary tract infections, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Epilobium subulatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
